channel.title: dead-code-hunter Architecture Docs
channel.description: Architecture documentation for the dead-code-hunter codebase. Explore files, functions, classes, domains, and dependencies.

item.description: Directory listing for src/__tests__/ in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 files and 0 subdirectories.

item.title: DeadCodeAnalysis Domain — dead-code-hunter Architecture
item.description: Core logic for processing and filtering dead code candidates retrieved from the analysis API. Architectural overview of the DeadCodeAnalysis domain in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: GitHubAction Domain — dead-code-hunter Architecture
item.description: The primary entry point and integration layer that handles the GitHub workflow environment and orchestration. Architectural overview of the GitHubAction domain in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 5 source files.

item.title: Markdown Domain — dead-code-hunter Architecture
item.description: Utility domain for transforming raw analysis data into GitHub-flavored Markdown. Architectural overview of the Markdown domain in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: SupermodelSDK Domain — dead-code-hunter Architecture
item.description: External integration domain for interfacing with the Supermodel static analysis engine. Architectural overview of the SupermodelSDK domain in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.
